purpose: Declare the containment rules for each root authority surface in ROOT_AUTHORITY_INVENTORY.json. These rules state what root authority evidence may and may not do. Non-operative — does not create authority, execute enforcement, authorize merge, authorize deploy, or generate proof.
core_invariant: Root authority evidence may observe, classify, and invalidate. Root authority evidence may not create merge legitimacy, deploy legitimacy, execution authorization, or proof. This invariant holds for all surfaces regardless of declared_containment_class.

may_do: Classify a merge epoch as illegitimate when admin bypass evidence is present
Invalidate legitimacy for epochs with unprotected admin mutations
Provide observable evidence of bypass in GitHub audit log
may_not_do: Create merge legitimacy for any epoch
containment_rules.declared_observability: GitHub audit log — admin bypass events are externally observable

may_do: Classify a merge epoch as illegitimate when branch protection bypass evidence is present
Invalidate PREO validity when branch protection is weakened outside governed mutation
containment_rules.declared_observability: GitHub audit log and merge-governance-check.yml workflow

may_do: Trigger governed deployment when all canonical chain inputs are valid
Classify dispatch invocations with invalid inputs as illegitimate
may_not_do: Authorize deployment without canonical chain completion
containment_rules.declared_observability: GitHub Actions workflow run logs — all dispatch invocations recorded
declared_compensating_controls: Hard-fail on missing or malformed canonical inputs

may_do: Classify deploy epochs where secrets were mutated outside governed process as illegitimate
Invalidate canonical chain routing when MINDSHIFT_WORKER_URL is mutated outside governance
containment_rules.declared_observability: GitHub audit log — secret mutation events are externally observable; no internal MindShift visibility
declared_compensating_controls: Restrict secret write to designated administrators

may_do: Classify deploy epochs triggered via Cloudflare Git Integration outside governed pipeline as illegitimate
Provide external deploy evidence via Cloudflare dashboard
containment_rules.declared_observability: Cloudflare dashboard deploy log only — no MindShift proof registry visibility
containment_rules.declared_open_action: Disable Cloudflare Git Integration at account level — account administrator action required; cannot be enforced from repository code

may_do: Classify deploy epochs triggered via local wrangler outside governed pipeline as illegitimate
Emit audit log entry in deploy_audit_registry.json for all invocations
containment_rules.declared_observability: deploy_audit_registry.json — governed-deploy.ts emits an entry for all invocations including rejections

may_do: Classify deploy epochs where token was used outside governed pipeline as illegitimate
Provide observable evidence of token-based deploy in Cloudflare dashboard
containment_rules.declared_observability: Cloudflare dashboard deploy log — MindShift proof registry only if governed workflow ran
declared_compensating_controls: Scope token to minimum required permissions
Bind to GitHub Actions OIDC where possible

may_do: Classify governance or infrastructure mutations made outside governed pipeline as illegitimate
Invalidate legitimacy identity if canonical serialization code is mutated outside governed change
containment_rules.declared_observability: Git commit history — infrastructure mutations observable via commit log; serialization code mutations detectable via code review and CODEOWNERS
declared_compensating_controls: CODEOWNERS for governance and serialization code
Required PR reviews for governance path mutations

may_do: Classify federated evidence as supporting or contradicting local legitimacy claims
Invalidate local legitimacy when federated evidence indicates governance bypass
may_not_do: Authorize merge, deploy, execution, or proof generation
containment_rules.declared_observability: Governance documents — topology visible via FEDERATED_RECONCILIATION_SPEC.json

containment_readiness_summary.declared_readiness_reason: RAS-005 (cloudflare_deploy_authority) is declared CONTAINMENT_REQUIRED. Pending account-level Cloudflare Git Integration disable. All other surfaces are declared CLASSIFIED_OPEN with evidence-only classification rules.
